{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\n@router.get(\"/{simulation_uuid}/runs\", response_model=SimulationRunsResponse)\nasync def get_simulation_runs(\n    simulation_uuid: str, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Get all runs for a simulation.\n\n    Returns a list of all simulation runs with their UUID, status, type, and name.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Verify simulation exists\n    simulation = get_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    if not simulation:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Simulation not found\")\n\n    # Verify user owns this simulation\n    if simulation.get(\"user_id\") != user_id:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail=\"Access denied\")\n\n    # Get all jobs for this simulation\n    jobs = get_simulation_jobs_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    # Sort by created_at ASC to calculate run index (Run 1 is the oldest)\n    sorted_by_created = sorted(jobs, key=lambda j: j.get(\"created_at\", \"\"))\n\n    # Create a mapping of job UUID to run index\n    job_to_index = {\n        job[\"uuid\"]: idx for idx, job in enumerate(sorted_by_created, start=1)\n    }\n\n    # Sort by updated_at DESC for response (most recently updated first)\n    sorted_by_updated = sorted(\n        jobs, key=lambda j: j.get(\"updated_at\", \"\"), reverse=True\n    )\n\n    runs = [\n        SimulationRunListItem(\n            uuid=job[\"uuid\"],\n            name=f\"Run {job_to_index[job['uuid']]}\",  # Use the index from creation order\n            status=job[\"status\"],\n            type=job[\"type\"],\n            updated_at=job[\"updated_at\"],\n        )\n        for job in sorted_by_updated\n    ]\n\n    return SimulationRunsResponse(runs=runs)",

        "originalContents": "\n\n\n@router.get(\"/{simulation_uuid}/runs\", response_model=SimulationRunsResponse)\nasync def get_simulation_runs(\n    simulation_uuid: str, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Get all runs for a simulation.\n\n    Returns a list of all simulation runs with their UUID, status, type, and name.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Verify simulation exists\n    simulation = get_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    if not simulation:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Simulation not found\")\n\n    # Verify user owns this simulation\n    if simulation.get(\"user_id\") != user_id:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail=\"Access denied\")\n\n    # Get all jobs for this simulation\n    jobs = get_simulation_jobs_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    # Sort by created_at ASC to calculate run index (Run 1 is the oldest)\n    sorted_by_created = sorted(jobs, key=lambda j: j.get(\"created_at\", \"\"))\n\n    # Create a mapping of job UUID to run index\n    job_to_index = {\n        job[\"uuid\"]: idx for idx, job in enumerate(sorted_by_created, start=1)\n    }\n\n    # Sort by updated_at DESC for response (most recently updated first)\n    sorted_by_updated = sorted(\n        jobs, key=lambda j: j.get(\"updated_at\", \"\"), reverse=True\n    )\n\n    runs = [\n        SimulationRunListItem(\n            uuid=job[\"uuid\"],\n            name=f\"Run {job_to_index[job['uuid']]}\",  # Use the index from creation order\n            status=job[\"status\"],\n            type=job[\"type\"],\n            updated_at=job[\"updated_at\"],\n        )\n        for job in sorted_by_updated\n    ]\n\n    return SimulationRunsResponse(runs=runs)",

        "contents": "\n\n\n@router.get(\"/run/{task_id}\", response_model=SimulationRunStatusResponse)\nasync def get_simulation_run_status(\n    task_id: str, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Get the status of a simulation run.\n\n    Returns the current status and, if done, the simulation results.\n    \"\"\"\n    job = get_simulation_job(task_id)\n    if not job:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Task not found\")\n\n    # Calculate run index based on creation order\n    simulation_id = job.get(\"simulation_id\")\n    run_name = \"Run 1\"  # Default\n    if simulation_id:\n        all_jobs = get_simulation_jobs_for_simulation(simulation_id)\n        # Sort by created_at ASC to get oldest first (Run 1 is the oldest)\n        sorted_jobs = sorted(all_jobs, key=lambda j: j.get(\"created_at\", \"\"))\n        # Find the index of current job (1-indexed)\n        for idx, j in enumerate(sorted_jobs, start=1):\n            if j[\"uuid\"] == task_id:\n                run_name = f\"Run {idx}\"\n                break\n\n    results = job.get(\"results\") or {}\n    simulation_results = results.get(\"simulation_results\") or []",

        "originalContents": "\n\n\n@router.get(\"/run/{task_id}\", response_model=SimulationRunStatusResponse)\nasync def get_simulation_run_status(\n    task_id: str, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Get the status of a simulation run.\n\n    Returns the current status and, if done, the simulation results.\n    \"\"\"\n    job = get_simulation_job(task_id)\n    if not job:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Task not found\")\n\n    # Calculate run index based on creation order\n    simulation_id = job.get(\"simulation_id\")\n    run_name = \"Run 1\"  # Default\n    if simulation_id:\n        all_jobs = get_simulation_jobs_for_simulation(simulation_id)\n        # Sort by created_at ASC to get oldest first (Run 1 is the oldest)\n        sorted_jobs = sorted(all_jobs, key=lambda j: j.get(\"created_at\", \"\"))\n        # Find the index of current job (1-indexed)\n        for idx, j in enumerate(sorted_jobs, start=1):\n            if j[\"uuid\"] == task_id:\n                run_name = f\"Run {idx}\"\n                break\n\n    results = job.get(\"results\") or {}\n    simulation_results = results.get(\"simulation_results\") or []",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 473
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 385
          }

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\n@router.post(\"/{simulation_uuid}/run\", response_model=TaskCreateResponse)\nasync def run_simulation_endpoint(\n    simulation_uuid: str,\n    request: RunSimulationRequest,\n    user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id),\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Run a simulation with personas, scenarios, and metrics.\n\n    This starts a background task that runs the pense LLM simulations command\n    with the agent's config and the simulation's personas, scenarios, and metrics.\n\n    Uses the agent linked to the simulation and its LLM model configuration.\n\n    Returns a task ID that can be used to poll for status and results.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Verify simulation exists\n    simulation = get_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    if not simulation:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Simulation not found\")\n\n    # Verify user owns this simulation\n    if simulation.get(\"user_id\") != user_id:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail=\"Access denied\")\n\n    # Get agent from simulation\n    agent_uuid = simulation.get(\"agent_id\")\n    if not agent_uuid:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=400,\n            detail=\"No agent linked to this simulation. Link an agent to the simulation first.\",\n        )\n\n    # Verify agent exists\n    agent = get_agent(agent_uuid)\n    if not agent:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Agent not found\")\n\n    # Get linked entities\n    personas = get_personas_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    scenarios = get_scenarios_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    metrics = get_metrics_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    if not personas:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=400,\n            detail=\"Simulation has no personas. Add at least one persona.\",\n        )\n\n    if not scenarios:\n        raise HTTPException(\n            status_code=400,\n            detail=\"Simulation has no scenarios. Add at least one scenario.\",\n        )",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\n@router.get(\"/{simulation_uuid}\", response_model=SimulationDetailResponse)\nasync def get_simulation_endpoint(\n    simulation_uuid: str, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"Get a simulation by UUID with all linked agent, personas, scenarios, and metrics.\"\"\"\n    simulation = get_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    if not simulation:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Simulation not found\")\n\n    # Verify user owns this simulation\n    if simulation.get(\"user_id\") != user_id:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail=\"Access denied\")\n\n    # Get linked agent\n    agent = None\n    if simulation.get(\"agent_id\"):\n        agent_data = get_agent(simulation[\"agent_id\"])\n        if agent_data:\n            agent = AgentSummaryResponse(\n                uuid=agent_data[\"uuid\"],\n                name=agent_data[\"name\"],\n                config=agent_data.get(\"config\"),\n                created_at=agent_data[\"created_at\"],\n                updated_at=agent_data[\"updated_at\"],\n            )\n\n    # Get linked entities\n    personas = get_personas_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    scenarios = get_scenarios_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    metrics = get_metrics_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    return SimulationDetailResponse(\n        uuid=simulation[\"uuid\"],\n        name=simulation[\"name\"],\n        agent=agent,\n        created_at=simulation[\"created_at\"],\n        updated_at=simulation[\"updated_at\"],\n        personas=personas,\n        scenarios=scenarios,\n        metrics=metrics,\n    )",

        "originalContents": "\n\n\n@router.get(\"/{simulation_uuid}\", response_model=SimulationDetailResponse)\nasync def get_simulation_endpoint(\n    simulation_uuid: str, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"Get a simulation by UUID with all linked agent, personas, scenarios, and metrics.\"\"\"\n    simulation = get_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    if not simulation:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Simulation not found\")\n\n    # Verify user owns this simulation\n    if simulation.get(\"user_id\") != user_id:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail=\"Access denied\")\n\n    # Get linked agent\n    agent = None\n    if simulation.get(\"agent_id\"):\n        agent_data = get_agent(simulation[\"agent_id\"])\n        if agent_data:\n            agent = AgentSummaryResponse(\n                uuid=agent_data[\"uuid\"],\n                name=agent_data[\"name\"],\n                config=agent_data.get(\"config\"),\n                created_at=agent_data[\"created_at\"],\n                updated_at=agent_data[\"updated_at\"],\n            )\n\n    # Get linked entities\n    personas = get_personas_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    scenarios = get_scenarios_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    metrics = get_metrics_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    return SimulationDetailResponse(\n        uuid=simulation[\"uuid\"],\n        name=simulation[\"name\"],\n        agent=agent,\n        created_at=simulation[\"created_at\"],\n        updated_at=simulation[\"updated_at\"],\n        personas=personas,\n        scenarios=scenarios,\n        metrics=metrics,\n    )",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "@router.get(\"/run/{task_id}\", response_model=SimulationRunStatusResponse)\nasync def get_simulation_run_status(\n    task_id: str, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    # If this is a voice simulation, generate presigned URLs for audio files\n    if job.get(\"type\") == \"voice\" and simulation_results:\n        try:\n            s3_bucket = get_s3_output_config()\n            # Update each simulation result with audio URLs if audios_s3_path (S3 key prefix) is present\n            for sim_result in simulation_results:\n                audios_s3_key_prefix = sim_result.get(\"audios_s3_path\")\n                if audios_s3_key_prefix:\n                    audio_urls = _get_audio_urls_from_s3_key(\n                        audios_s3_key_prefix, s3_bucket\n                    )\n                    sim_result[\"audio_urls\"] = audio_urls\n                    logger.info(\n                        f\"Generated {len(audio_urls)} presigned URLs for simulation {sim_result.get('simulation_name')}\"\n                    )\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to generate audio URLs: {str(e)}\")\n            # Continue without audio URLs if generation fails\n\n    return SimulationRunStatusResponse(\n        task_id=task_id,\n        name=run_name,\n        status=job[\"status\"],\n        type=job[\"type\"],\n        updated_at=job[\"updated_at\"],\n        total_simulations=results.get(\"total_simulations\"),\n        completed_simulations=results.get(\"completed_simulations\"),\n        metrics=results.get(\"metrics\"),\n        simulation_results=simulation_results,\n        error=results.get(\"error\"),\n    )",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "            s3_bucket = get_s3_output_config()"

          },

            "text": "                        f\"Generated {len(audio_urls)} presigned URLs for simulation {sim_result.get('simulation_name')}\""

        "originalContents": "\n\n    # If this is a voice simulation, generate presigned URLs for audio files\n    if job.get(\"type\") == \"voice\" and simulation_results:\n        try:\n            s3_bucket = get_s3_output_config()\n            # Update each simulation result with audio URLs if audios_s3_path (S3 key prefix) is present\n            for sim_result in simulation_results:\n                audios_s3_key_prefix = sim_result.get(\"audios_s3_path\")\n                if audios_s3_key_prefix:\n                    audio_urls = _get_audio_urls_from_s3_key(\n                        audios_s3_key_prefix, s3_bucket\n                    )\n                    sim_result[\"audio_urls\"] = audio_urls\n                    logger.info(\n                        f\"Generated {len(audio_urls)} presigned URLs for simulation {sim_result.get('simulation_name')}\"\n                    )\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"Failed to generate audio URLs: {str(e)}\")\n            # Continue without audio URLs if generation fails\n\n    return SimulationRunStatusResponse(\n        task_id=task_id,\n        name=run_name,\n        status=job[\"status\"],\n        type=job[\"type\"],\n        updated_at=job[\"updated_at\"],\n        total_simulations=results.get(\"total_simulations\"),\n        completed_simulations=results.get(\"completed_simulations\"),\n        metrics=results.get(\"metrics\"),\n        simulation_results=simulation_results,\n        error=results.get(\"error\"),\n    )",

        "contents": "\n\n\n@router.get(\"\", response_model=List[SimulationListResponse])\nasync def list_simulations(user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)):\n    \"\"\"List all simulations for the authenticated user.\"\"\"\n    simulations = get_all_simulations(user_id=user_id)\n    result = []\n    for sim in simulations:\n        agent = None\n        if sim.get(\"agent_id\"):\n            agent_data = get_agent(sim[\"agent_id\"])\n            if agent_data:\n                agent = AgentSummaryResponse(\n                    uuid=agent_data[\"uuid\"],\n                    name=agent_data[\"name\"],\n                    config=agent_data.get(\"config\"),\n                    created_at=agent_data[\"created_at\"],\n                    updated_at=agent_data[\"updated_at\"],\n                )\n        result.append(\n            SimulationListResponse(\n                uuid=sim[\"uuid\"],\n                name=sim[\"name\"],\n                agent=agent,\n                created_at=sim[\"created_at\"],\n                updated_at=sim[\"updated_at\"],\n            )\n        )\n    return result",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "@router.post(\"/{simulation_uuid}/run\", response_model=TaskCreateResponse)\nasync def run_simulation_endpoint(\n    simulation_uuid: str,\n    request: RunSimulationRequest,\n    user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id),\n):\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    # Get S3 configuration\n    try:\n        s3_bucket = get_s3_output_config()\n    except ValueError as e:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))\n\n    # Check if we can start immediately or need to queue\n    can_start = can_start_simulation_job(SIMULATION_JOB_TYPES)\n    initial_status = (\n        TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS.value if can_start else TaskStatus.QUEUED.value\n    )\n\n    # Create job in database with details for recovery\n    job_id = create_simulation_job(\n        simulation_id=simulation_uuid,\n        job_type=request.type,\n        status=initial_status,\n        details={\n            \"simulation_uuid\": simulation_uuid,\n            \"agent_uuid\": agent_uuid,\n            \"s3_bucket\": s3_bucket,\n        },\n        results=None,\n    )\n\n    if can_start:\n        # Start background task in a separate thread\n        thread = threading.Thread(\n            target=run_simulation_task,\n            args=(job_id, agent, personas, scenarios, metrics, s3_bucket, request.type),\n            daemon=True,\n        )\n        thread.start()\n        logger.info(f\"Started {request.type} simulation job {job_id} immediately\")\n    else:\n        logger.info(f\"Queued {request.type} simulation job {job_id}\")\n\n    return TaskCreateResponse(task_id=job_id, status=initial_status)",

        "originalContents": "\n\n\nclass SimulationRunStatusResponse(BaseModel):\n    task_id: str\n    name: str  # Format: \"Run {index}\"\n    status: str\n    type: str\n    updated_at: str\n    total_simulations: Optional[int] = None\n    completed_simulations: Optional[int] = (\n        None  # Number of completed simulations (for in_progress voice simulations)\n    )\n    metrics: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None\n    simulation_results: Optional[List[SimulationCaseResult]] = None\n    error: Optional[str] = None",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\n# Register the job starters for simulation jobs\nregister_job_starter(\"text\", _start_simulation_job_from_queue)\nregister_job_starter(\"voice\", _start_simulation_job_from_queue)\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/simulations\", tags=[\"simulations\"])\n\n\ndef _get_audio_urls_from_s3_key(s3_key_prefix: str, s3_bucket: str) -\u003e List[str]:\n    \"\"\"\n    List all audio files in an S3 key prefix and generate presigned URLs for them.\n\n    Args:\n        s3_key_prefix: S3 key prefix (e.g., \"simulations/runs/task_id/simulation_persona_1_scenario_1/audios\")\n        s3_bucket: S3 bucket name\n\n    Returns:\n        List of presigned URLs for audio files, sorted by filename\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        s3 = get_s3_client()\n\n        # Ensure prefix ends with / for directory listing\n        if s3_key_prefix and not s3_key_prefix.endswith(\"/\"):\n            s3_key_prefix += \"/\"\n\n        # List objects in the S3 prefix\n        audio_extensions = {\".wav\", \".mp3\", \".ogg\"}\n        audio_files = []\n\n        paginator = s3.get_paginator(\"list_objects_v2\")\n        for page in paginator.paginate(Bucket=s3_bucket, Prefix=s3_key_prefix):\n            if \"Contents\" in page:\n                for obj in page[\"Contents\"]:\n                    key = obj[\"Key\"]\n                    # Skip if it's a directory marker\n                    if key.endswith(\"/\"):\n                        continue\n                    # Check if it's an audio file\n                    file_ext = Path(key).suffix.lower()\n                    if file_ext in audio_extensions:\n                        audio_files.append(key)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "def _start_simulation_job_from_queue(job: dict) -\u003e bool:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": ","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "        daemon=True,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    thread.start()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    return True"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\n\n# Register the job starters for simulation jobs\nregister_job_starter(\"text\", _start_simulation_job_from_queue)\nregister_job_starter(\"voice\", _start_simulation_job_from_queue)\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/simulations\", tags=[\"simulations\"])\n\n\ndef _get_audio_urls_from_s3_key(s3_key_prefix: str, s3_bucket: str) -\u003e List[str]:\n    \"\"\"\n    List all audio files in an S3 key prefix and generate presigned URLs for them.\n\n    Args:\n        s3_key_prefix: S3 key prefix (e.g., \"simulations/runs/task_id/simulation_persona_1_scenario_1/audios\")\n        s3_bucket: S3 bucket name\n\n    Returns:\n        List of presigned URLs for audio files, sorted by filename\n    \"\"\"\n    try:\n        s3 = get_s3_client()\n\n        # Ensure prefix ends with / for directory listing\n        if s3_key_prefix and not s3_key_prefix.endswith(\"/\"):\n            s3_key_prefix += \"/\"\n\n        # List objects in the S3 prefix\n        audio_extensions = {\".wav\", \".mp3\", \".ogg\"}\n        audio_files = []\n\n        paginator = s3.get_paginator(\"list_objects_v2\")\n        for page in paginator.paginate(Bucket=s3_bucket, Prefix=s3_key_prefix):\n            if \"Contents\" in page:\n                for obj in page[\"Contents\"]:\n                    key = obj[\"Key\"]\n                    # Skip if it's a directory marker\n                    if key.endswith(\"/\"):\n                        continue\n                    # Check if it's an audio file\n                    file_ext = Path(key).suffix.lower()\n                    if file_ext in audio_extensions:\n                        audio_files.append(key)",

        "contents": "@router.put(\"/{simulation_uuid}\", response_model=SimulationDetailResponse)\nasync def update_simulation_endpoint(\n    simulation_uuid: str,\n    simulation: SimulationUpdate,\n    user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id),\n):\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    # Return full detail response\n    updated_simulation = get_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    # Get linked agent\n    agent = None\n    if updated_simulation.get(\"agent_id\"):\n        agent_data = get_agent(updated_simulation[\"agent_id\"])\n        if agent_data:\n            agent = AgentSummaryResponse(\n                uuid=agent_data[\"uuid\"],\n                name=agent_data[\"name\"],\n                config=agent_data.get(\"config\"),\n                created_at=agent_data[\"created_at\"],\n                updated_at=agent_data[\"updated_at\"],\n            )\n\n    personas = get_personas_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    scenarios = get_scenarios_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    metrics = get_metrics_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    return SimulationDetailResponse(\n        uuid=updated_simulation[\"uuid\"],\n        name=updated_simulation[\"name\"],\n        agent=agent,\n        created_at=updated_simulation[\"created_at\"],\n        updated_at=updated_simulation[\"updated_at\"],\n        personas=personas,\n        scenarios=scenarios,\n        metrics=metrics,\n    )",

        "originalContents": "\n\n    # Return full detail response\n    updated_simulation = get_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    # Get linked agent\n    agent = None\n    if updated_simulation.get(\"agent_id\"):\n        agent_data = get_agent(updated_simulation[\"agent_id\"])\n        if agent_data:\n            agent = AgentSummaryResponse(\n                uuid=agent_data[\"uuid\"],\n                name=agent_data[\"name\"],\n                config=agent_data.get(\"config\"),\n                created_at=agent_data[\"created_at\"],\n                updated_at=agent_data[\"updated_at\"],\n            )\n\n    personas = get_personas_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    scenarios = get_scenarios_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n    metrics = get_metrics_for_simulation(simulation_uuid)\n\n    return SimulationDetailResponse(\n        uuid=updated_simulation[\"uuid\"],\n        name=updated_simulation[\"name\"],\n        agent=agent,\n        created_at=updated_simulation[\"created_at\"],\n        updated_at=updated_simulation[\"updated_at\"],\n        personas=personas,\n        scenarios=scenarios,\n        metrics=metrics,\n    )",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\n@router.post(\"\", response_model=SimulationCreateResponse)\nasync def create_simulation_endpoint(\n    simulation: SimulationCreate, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"Create a new simulation with optional linked agent, personas, scenarios, and metrics.\"\"\"\n    # Verify agent exists if provided\n    if simulation.agent_uuid:\n        agent = get_agent(simulation.agent_uuid)\n        if not agent:\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Agent not found\")\n\n    # Verify all personas exist\n    if simulation.persona_uuids:\n        for persona_uuid in simulation.persona_uuids:\n            persona = get_persona(persona_uuid)\n            if not persona:\n                raise HTTPException(\n                    status_code=404, detail=f\"Persona {persona_uuid} not found\"\n                )\n\n    # Verify all scenarios exist\n    if simulation.scenario_uuids:\n        for scenario_uuid in simulation.scenario_uuids:\n            scenario = get_scenario(scenario_uuid)\n            if not scenario:\n                raise HTTPException(\n                    status_code=404, detail=f\"Scenario {scenario_uuid} not found\"\n                )\n\n    # Verify all metrics exist\n    if simulation.metric_uuids:\n        for metric_uuid in simulation.metric_uuids:\n            metric = get_metric(metric_uuid)\n            if not metric:\n                raise HTTPException(\n                    status_code=404, detail=f\"Metric {metric_uuid} not found\"\n                )\n\n    # Create the simulation\n    simulation_uuid = create_simulation(\n        name=simulation.name, agent_id=simulation.agent_uuid, user_id=user_id\n    )\n\n    # Add personas to simulation\n    if simulation.persona_uuids:\n        for persona_uuid in simulation.persona_uuids:\n            add_persona_to_simulation(simulation_uuid, persona_uuid)\n\n    # Add scenarios to simulation\n    if simulation.scenario_uuids:\n        for scenario_uuid in simulation.scenario_uuids:\n            add_scenario_to_simulation(simulation_uuid, scenario_uuid)",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\n\n\n@router.post(\"\", response_model=SimulationCreateResponse)\nasync def create_simulation_endpoint(\n    simulation: SimulationCreate, user_id: str = Depends(get_current_user_id)\n):\n    \"\"\"Create a new simulation with optional linked agent, personas, scenarios, and metrics.\"\"\"\n    # Verify agent exists if provided\n    if simulation.agent_uuid:\n        agent = get_agent(simulation.agent_uuid)\n        if not agent:\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=\"Agent not found\")\n\n    # Verify all personas exist\n    if simulation.persona_uuids:\n        for persona_uuid in simulation.persona_uuids:\n            persona = get_persona(persona_uuid)\n            if not persona:\n                raise HTTPException(\n                    status_code=404, detail=f\"Persona {persona_uuid} not found\"\n                )\n\n    # Verify all scenarios exist\n    if simulation.scenario_uuids:\n        for scenario_uuid in simulation.scenario_uuids:\n            scenario = get_scenario(scenario_uuid)\n            if not scenario:\n                raise HTTPException(\n                    status_code=404, detail=f\"Scenario {scenario_uuid} not found\"\n                )\n\n    # Verify all metrics exist\n    if simulation.metric_uuids:\n        for metric_uuid in simulation.metric_uuids:\n            metric = get_metric(metric_uuid)\n            if not metric:\n                raise HTTPException(\n                    status_code=404, detail=f\"Metric {metric_uuid} not found\"\n                )\n\n    # Create the simulation\n    simulation_uuid = create_simulation(\n        name=simulation.name, agent_id=simulation.agent_uuid, user_id=user_id\n    )\n\n    # Add personas to simulation\n    if simulation.persona_uuids:\n        for persona_uuid in simulation.persona_uuids:\n            add_persona_to_simulation(simulation_uuid, persona_uuid)\n\n    # Add scenarios to simulation\n    if simulation.scenario_uuids:\n        for scenario_uuid in simulation.scenario_uuids:\n            add_scenario_to_simulation(simulation_uuid, scenario_uuid)",

        "contents": "\n\n\n# ============ Jobs Functions ============\n\n\ndef create_job(\n    job_type: str,\n    status: str = \"in_progress\",\n    details: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n    results: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n) -\u003e str:\n    \"\"\"Create a new job and return its UUID.\n\n    Args:\n        job_type: Type of job (stt-eval, tts-eval, llm-unit-test, llm-benchmark)\n        status: Initial status (defaults to 'in_progress')\n        details: JSON config needed to re-trigger the job if interrupted\n        results: Initial results (usually None)\n    \"\"\"\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        job_uuid = str(uuid.uuid4())\n        details_json = json.dumps(details) if details is not None else None\n        results_json = json.dumps(results) if results is not None else None\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            INSERT INTO jobs (uuid, type, status, details, results)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n            \"\"\",\n            (job_uuid, job_type, status, details_json, results_json),\n        )\n        conn.commit()\n        logger.info(f\"Created job with UUID: {job_uuid}, type: {job_type}\")\n        return job_uuid",

        "originalContents": "\n\n\n# ============ Simulation Jobs Functions ============\n\n\ndef create_simulation_job(\n    simulation_id: str,\n    job_type: str,\n    status: str = \"in_progress\",\n    details: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n    results: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n) -\u003e str:\n    \"\"\"Create a new simulation job and return its UUID.\n\n    Args:\n        simulation_id: UUID of the simulation this job is for\n        job_type: Type of job (llm-simulation)\n        status: Initial status (defaults to 'in_progress')\n        details: JSON config needed to re-trigger the job if interrupted\n        results: Initial results (usually None)\n    \"\"\"\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        job_uuid = str(uuid.uuid4())\n        details_json = json.dumps(details) if details is not None else None\n        results_json = json.dumps(results) if results is not None else None\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            INSERT INTO simulation_jobs (uuid, simulation_id, type, status, details, results)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n            \"\"\",\n            (job_uuid, simulation_id, job_type, status, details_json, results_json),\n        )\n        conn.commit()\n        logger.info(\n            f\"Created simulation job with UUID: {job_uuid}, type: {job_type}, simulation: {simulation_id}\"\n        )\n        return job_uuid",

        "contents": "\n\n\ndef get_all_jobs(job_type: Optional[str] = None) -\u003e List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n    \"\"\"Get all jobs, optionally filtered by type.\"\"\"\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        if job_type:\n            cursor.execute(\n                \"SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE type = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC\",\n                (job_type,),\n            )\n        else:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT * FROM jobs ORDER BY created_at DESC\")\n        rows = cursor.fetchall()\n        return [_parse_job_row(row) for row in rows]",

ORDER BY created_at DESC\",\n                (job_type,),\n            )\n        else:\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT * FROM jobs ORDER BY created_at DESC\")\n        rows = cursor.fetchall()\n        return [_parse_job_row(row) for row in rows]",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\ndef update_job(\n    job_uuid: str,\n    status: Optional[str] = None,\n    results: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n    details: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n) -\u003e bool:\n    \"\"\"Update a job. Returns True if the job was found and updated.\n\n    If details is provided, it will be merged with existing details (not replaced).\n    \"\"\"\n    updates = []\n    params = []\n\n    if status is not None:\n        updates.append(\"status = ?\")\n        params.append(status)\n    if results is not None:\n        updates.append(\"results = ?\")\n        params.append(json.dumps(results))\n\n    # For details, we need to merge with existing details\n    if details is not None:\n        # First, fetch existing details\n        with get_db_connection() as conn:\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT details FROM jobs WHERE uuid = ?\", (job_uuid,))\n            row = cursor.fetchone()\n            if row and row[0]:\n                existing_details = json.loads(row[0])\n                # Merge new details into existing\n                existing_details.update(details)\n                details = existing_details\n        updates.append(\"details = ?\")\n        params.append(json.dumps(details))\n\n    if not updates:\n        return False\n\n    updates.append(\"updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\")\n    params.append(job_uuid)\n\n    query = f\"UPDATE jobs SET {', '.join(updates)} WHERE uuid = ?\"\n\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        cursor.execute(query, params)\n        conn.commit()\n        updated = cursor.rowcount \u003e 0\n        if updated:\n            logger.info(f\"Updated job with UUID: {job_uuid}\")\n        return updated",
        "detailedLines": [

Returns True if the job was found and updated.\n\n    If details is provided, it will be merged with existing details (not replaced).\n    \"\"\"\n    updates = []\n    params = []\n\n    if status is not None:\n        updates.append(\"status = ?\")\n        params.append(status)\n    if results is not None:\n        updates.append(\"results = ?\")\n        params.append(json.dumps(results))\n\n    # For details, we need to merge with existing details\n    if details is not None:\n        # First, fetch existing details\n        with get_db_connection() as conn:\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n            cursor.execute(\"SELECT details FROM jobs WHERE uuid = ?\", (job_uuid,))\n            row = cursor.fetchone()\n            if row and row[0]:\n                existing_details = json.loads(row[0])\n                # Merge new details into existing\n                existing_details.update(details)\n                details = existing_details\n        updates.append(\"details = ?\")\n        params.append(json.dumps(details))\n\n    if not updates:\n        return False\n\n    updates.append(\"updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\")\n    params.append(job_uuid)\n\n    query = f\"UPDATE jobs SET {', '.join(updates)} WHERE uuid = ?\"\n\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        cursor.execute(query, params)\n        conn.commit()\n        updated = cursor.rowcount \u003e 0\n        if updated:\n            logger.info(f\"Updated job with UUID: {job_uuid}\")\n        return updated",

        "contents": "\n\n\ndef _parse_job_row(row: sqlite3.Row) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"Parse a job database row and deserialize JSON fields.\"\"\"\n    job = dict(row)\n    if job.get(\"details\"):\n        job[\"details\"] = json.loads(job[\"details\"])\n    if job.get(\"results\"):\n        job[\"results\"] = json.loads(job[\"results\"])\n    return job",

        "originalContents": "\n\n\ndef _parse_job_row(row: sqlite3.Row) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"Parse a job database row and deserialize JSON fields.\"\"\"\n    job = dict(row)\n    if job.get(\"details\"):\n        job[\"details\"] = json.loads(job[\"details\"])\n    if job.get(\"results\"):\n        job[\"results\"] = json.loads(job[\"results\"])\n    return job",

        "contents": "\n\n\ndef get_job(job_uuid: str) -\u003e Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:\n    \"\"\"Get a job by UUID.\"\"\"\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        cursor.execute(\"SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE uuid = ?\", (job_uuid,))\n        row = cursor.fetchone()\n        if row:\n            return _parse_job_row(row)\n        return None",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\ndef get_queued_jobs(job_types: Optional[List[str]] = None) -\u003e List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n    \"\"\"Get all jobs with status 'queued', optionally filtered by job types.\"\"\"\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        if job_types:\n            placeholders = \",\".join(\"?\" for _ in job_types)\n            cursor.execute(\n                f\"SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE status = 'queued' AND type IN ({placeholders}) ORDER BY created_at ASC\",\n                job_types,\n            )\n        else:\n            cursor.execute(\n                \"SELECT * FROM jobs WHERE status = 'queued' ORDER BY created_at ASC\"\n            )\n        rows = cursor.fetchall()\n        return [_parse_job_row(row) for row in rows]",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\ndef init_db():\n    \"\"\"Initialize the database and create tables if they don't exist.\"\"\"\n    # Ensure the data directory exists\n    DB_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n        # Create users table first (other tables reference it)\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n                uuid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                first_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                last_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n            )\n        \"\"\"\n        )\n\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agents (\n                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n                uuid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                config TEXT,\n                user_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                deleted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL,\n                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(uuid)\n            )\n        \"\"\"\n        )\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tools (\n                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n                uuid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                description TEXT,\n                config TEXT,\n                user_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                deleted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL,\n                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(uuid)\n            )\n        \"\"\"\n        )",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\n\n\ndef init_db():\n    \"\"\"Initialize the database and create tables if they don't exist.\"\"\"\n    # Ensure the data directory exists\n    DB_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n        # Create users table first (other tables reference it)\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n                uuid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                first_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                last_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n            )\n        \"\"\"\n        )\n\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agents (\n                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n                uuid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                config TEXT,\n                user_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                deleted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL,\n                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(uuid)\n            )\n        \"\"\"\n        )\n        cursor.execute(\n            \"\"\"\n            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tools (\n                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n                uuid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n                name TEXT NOT NULL,\n                description TEXT,\n                config TEXT,\n                user_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL,\n                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n                deleted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL,\n                FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(uuid)\n            )\n        \"\"\"\n        )",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n\ndef try_start_queued_job(job_types: List[str]) -\u003e bool:\n    \"\"\"Try to start the next queued job if there's capacity.\n\n    Args:\n        job_types: List of job types to consider (e.g., [\"stt-eval\", \"tts-eval\"])\n\n    Returns:\n        True if a job was started, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Import here to avoid circular imports\n    from db import count_running_jobs, get_queued_jobs, update_job\n\n    with _job_queue_lock:\n        max_jobs = get_max_concurrent_jobs()\n        running_count = count_running_jobs(job_types)\n\n        logger.info(f\"Job queue check: {running_count}/{max_jobs} jobs running\")\n\n        if running_count \u003e= max_jobs:\n            logger.info(\"Max concurrent jobs reached, not starting new job\")\n            return False\n\n        # Get the oldest queued job\n        queued_jobs = get_queued_jobs(job_types)\n        if not queued_jobs:\n            logger.info(\"No queued jobs to start\")\n            return False\n\n        job = queued_jobs[0]\n        job_id = job[\"uuid\"]\n        job_type = job.get(\"type\")\n\n        # Find the appropriate starter callback\n        starter_callback = _job_starters.get(job_type)\n        if not starter_callback:\n            logger.error(f\"No job starter registered for type: {job_type}\")\n            return False\n\n        # Update status to in_progress before starting\n        update_job(job_id, status=TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS.value)\n        logger.info(f\"Starting queued job {job_id} of type {job_type}\")\n\n        try:\n            # Start the job (this should spawn a thread)\n            starter_callback(job)\n            return True\n        except Exception as e:\n            # If starting fails, mark as done with error\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to start job {job_id}: {e}\")\n            update_job(\n                job_id,\n                status=TaskStatus.DONE.value,\n                results={\"error\": f\"Failed to start job: {str(e)}\"},\n            )\n            return False",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "def register_job_starter(job_type: str, starter_callback: callable) -\u003e None:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "    logger.info(f\"Registered job starter for type: {job_type}\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "def try_start_queued_job(job_types: List[str]) -\u003e bool:"
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\n\ndef try_start_queued_job(job_types: List[str]) -\u003e bool:\n    \"\"\"Try to start the next queued job if there's capacity.\n\n    Args:\n        job_types: List of job types to consider (e.g., [\"stt-eval\", \"tts-eval\"])\n\n    Returns:\n        True if a job was started, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Import here to avoid circular imports\n    from db import count_running_jobs, get_queued_jobs, update_job\n\n    with _job_queue_lock:\n        max_jobs = get_max_concurrent_jobs()\n        running_count = count_running_jobs(job_types)\n\n        logger.info(f\"Job queue check: {running_count}/{max_jobs} jobs running\")\n\n        if running_count \u003e= max_jobs:\n            logger.info(\"Max concurrent jobs reached, not starting new job\")\n            return False\n\n        # Get the oldest queued job\n        queued_jobs = get_queued_jobs(job_types)\n        if not queued_jobs:\n            logger.info(\"No queued jobs to start\")\n            return False\n\n        job = queued_jobs[0]\n        job_id = job[\"uuid\"]\n        job_type = job.get(\"type\")\n\n        # Find the appropriate starter callback\n        starter_callback = _job_starters.get(job_type)\n        if not starter_callback:\n            logger.error(f\"No job starter registered for type: {job_type}\")\n            return False\n\n        # Update status to in_progress before starting\n        update_job(job_id, status=TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS.value)\n        logger.info(f\"Starting queued job {job_id} of type {job_type}\")\n\n        try:\n            # Start the job (this should spawn a thread)\n            starter_callback(job)\n            return True\n        except Exception as e:\n            # If starting fails, mark as done with error\n            logger.error(f\"Failed to start job {job_id}: {e}\")\n            update_job(\n                job_id,\n                status=TaskStatus.DONE.value,\n                results={\"error\": f\"Failed to start job: {str(e)}\"},\n            )\n            return False",

        "contents": "\n\n\ndef update_simulation_job(\n    job_uuid: str,\n    status: Optional[str] = None,\n    results: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n    details: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\n) -\u003e bool:\n    \"\"\"Update a simulation job. Returns True if the job was found and updated.\n\n    If details is provided, it will be merged with existing details (not replaced).\n    \"\"\"\n    updates = []\n    params = []\n\n    if status is not None:\n        updates.append(\"status = ?\")\n        params.append(status)\n    if results is not None:\n        updates.append(\"results = ?\")\n        params.append(json.dumps(results))\n\n    # For details, we need to merge with existing details\n    if details is not None:\n        # First, fetch existing details\n        with get_db_connection() as conn:\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n            cursor.execute(\n                \"SELECT details FROM simulation_jobs WHERE uuid = ?\", (job_uuid,)\n            )\n            row = cursor.fetchone()\n            if row and row[0]:\n                existing_details = json.loads(row[0])\n                # Merge new details into existing\n                existing_details.update(details)\n                details = existing_details\n        updates.append(\"details = ?\")\n        params.append(json.dumps(details))\n\n    if not updates:\n        return False\n\n    updates.append(\"updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\")\n    params.append(job_uuid)\n\n    query = f\"UPDATE simulation_jobs SET {', '.join(updates)} WHERE uuid = ?\"\n\n    with get_db_connection() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        cursor.execute(query, params)\n        conn.commit()\n        updated = cursor.rowcount \u003e 0\n        if updated:\n            logger.info(f\"Updated simulation job with UUID: {job_uuid}\")\n        return updated",

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,70 @@
- 
+ from typing import List, Optional, Any, Dict
+ from enum import Enum
+ 
+ from fastapi import APIRouter, Query
+ from pydantic import BaseModel
+ 
+ from db import get_all_jobs
+ 
+ 
+ router = APIRouter(prefix="/jobs", tags=["jobs"])
+ 
+ 
+ class JobType(str, Enum):
+     STT = "stt"
+     TTS = "tts"
+ 
+ 
+ class JobListItem(BaseModel):
+     uuid: str
+     type: str
+     status: str
+     details: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
+     results: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
+     created_at: str
+     updated_at: str
+ 
+ 
+ class JobsListResponse(BaseModel):
+     jobs: List[JobListItem]
+ 
+ 
+ # Map user-friendly job type to actual job type in database
+ JOB_TYPE_MAP = {
+     JobType.STT: "stt-eval",
+     JobType.TTS: "tts-eval",
+ }
+ 
+ 
+ @router.get("", response_model=JobsListResponse)
+ async def list_jobs(
+     job_type: Optional[JobType] = Query(
+         None, description="Filter jobs by type: 'stt' or 'tts'"
+     ),
+ ):
+     """
+     Get all jobs, optionally filtered by job type.
+ 
+     Returns a list of all jobs with their UUID, type, status, details, results, and timestamps.
+     Jobs are sorted by created_at descending (most recent first).
+     """
+     # Map the user-friendly job type to the actual database job type
+     db_job_type = JOB_TYPE_MAP.get(job_type) if job_type else None
+ 
+     jobs = get_all_jobs(job_type=db_job_type)
+ 
+     job_items = [
+         JobListItem(
+             uuid=job["uuid"],
+             type=job["type"],
+             status=job["status"],
+             details=job.get("details"),
+             results=job.get("results"),
+             created_at=job["created_at"],
+             updated_at=job["updated_at"],
+         )
+         for job in jobs
+     ]
+ 
+     return JobsListResponse(jobs=job_items)
+ 
```

</details>

I've added the API endpoint to get all jobs. Here's what was created:

```json

    {
      "uuid": "...",
      "type": "stt-eval",
      "status": "done",
      "details": {...},
      "results": {...},
      "created_at": "...",
      "updated_at": "..."
    }
  ]
}
```

Usage examples:
- `GET /jobs` - Get all jobs
- `GET /jobs?job_type=stt` - Get only STT evaluation jobs
- `GET /jobs?job_type=tts` - Get only TTS evaluation jobs
